name: team-rocket
description: Three-role process (implementer / verifier / memory) for multi-session software work, focused on the quality of what ships: correct, simple, honest, right-sized, maintainable code. Lead-driven by default: the main session drives the goal loop, spawning the implementer and verifier as subagents per goal and continuing without asking; the locked plan is the authority, and no question reaches the human that the repo or tracker can answer. Native live-cluster (Agent Teams) and Archon-harness modes are optional. TDD, production-confidence verification, named code smells, and deterministic guardrails are means to that end, not the goal.
